text: Aaj jab un logo ko mere accent ka mazak udate suna toh dil baith gaya, par main rone ke liye ruk nahi sakti kyunki bacchon ki school ki taiyari aur saas ki dawai ka waqt ho gaya hai. Ek widow hone ke naate samaj ki nazrein mujh par hamesha rehti hain, isliye main bas apna kaam kiye ja rahi hoon taaki parivaar ki 'izzat' bani rahe. Thakan itni hai ki sharir toot raha hai, par 'farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai.

Mera accent unke liye joke hai, par mere liye ye meri purani identity ka bacha hua hissa hai jo main joint family ki 'bahu' banne ke chakkar mein kho chuki hoon. Divorcee hone ka stigma pehle hi dimaag pe bojh hai, par main break nahi le sakti kyunki bacchon ke future ke liye mujhe hi structural endurance dikhani hai. Main thak kar choor hoon, par mera kirdaar hi mere bacchon ki dhaal hai isliye rukkna meri kismat mein nahi.

Unke tano ke baad dil kiya ki sab chhod doon, par career gap itna bada hai ki mujhe har choti insult peekar bhi kaam karna padega taaki bacchon ki schooling na ruke. Samaj mein akeli aurat ko bohot kuch sehna padta hai, isliye main apni feelings ko side karke bas ghar ke kaamo aur bacchon ki parvarish mein lagi hoon. Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai, bas endurance hi meri majboori ban gayi hai.

Accent ka mazaak sunkar laga ki shayad main is naye shehar ke kabil nahi, par phir bacchon ka chehra yaad aa gaya jinke liye mujhe 'izzat' se rehna hai. Joint family mein child pressure aur saas ki demands ke beech main ek machine ban gayi hoon jo bas obligations poori karti hai. Main afford nahi kar sakti ki bacchon ko koi financial kami mehsus ho, isliye main bas bina ruke chalti ja rahi hoon.

Logon ke mazak aur community exclusion ne mujhe tod diya hai, par bacchon ki izzat ke liye main har din wahi purani routine follow karti hoon. Single mother hone ki wajah se 'log kya kahenge' wala darr hamesha rehta hai, isliye main thakan mein bhi har farz nibhati hoon taaki koi ungli na utha sake. Mera dimaag blank hai par mere hath kaam karte rehte hain kyunki zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai.
